childNodes.textContent: * { box-sizing: border-box; }body { margin: 0px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; background: rgb(245, 245, 247); color: rgb(29, 29, 31); }.app { max-width: 480px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 32px 20px 80px; }.app-header { margin-bottom: 20px; }.app-title { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }.app-subtitle { margin: 4px 0px 0px; font-size: 14px; color: rgb(110, 110, 115); font-style: italic; }.add-item-form { display: flex; gap: 8px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 0px 1px 3px; margin-bottom: 20px; }.add-item-input { flex: 1 1 0%; border: 1px solid rgb(210, 210, 215); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 15px; outline: none; }.add-item-input:focus { border-color: rgb(0, 113, 227); }.add-item-button { background: rgb(0, 113, 227); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; }.add-item-button:hover { background: rgb(0, 91, 181); }.todo-list { list-style: none; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06) 0px 1px 3px; overflow: hidden; }.todo-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 18px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(236, 236, 236); }.todo-item:last-child { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-style: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; }.todo-checkbox { width: 18px; height: 18px; cursor: pointer; }.todo-text { font-size: 15px; }
Reply to Sarah about dinner plans
